description: Enterprise Phase 2: Real-time collaboration, PDF generation, executive dashboards, global search, audit trail, bulk ops, and performance optimization

userStories.title: Supabase Realtime hook for live table subscriptions
userStories.description: Create a reusable useRealtimeSubscription hook that subscribes to Supabase Realtime channels for any table. Auto-reconnects, handles cleanup, and triggers React Query cache invalidation on INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events.
acceptanceCriteria: useRealtimeSubscription hook exists with table, filter, and onEvent params
Hook subscribes to Supabase Realtime channel on mount
Hook unsubscribes on unmount (no memory leaks)
INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE events trigger callback
React Query queryClient.invalidateQueries called on events
Reconnection logic on channel error
Tests cover mount/unmount/event/error scenarios
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Foundation for all live features. Keep it generic — table name + filter as params.

userStories.title: Live notification bell with unread count badge
userStories.description: Wire the existing useNotifications hook to Supabase Realtime so new notifications appear instantly without page refresh. Add unread count badge to the Header bell icon. Mark-as-read on click.
acceptanceCriteria: NotificationBell component renders in Header
Unread count badge shows number of unread notifications
New notifications appear in real-time via Realtime subscription
Clicking notification marks it as read
Badge count decrements on mark-as-read
Dropdown shows recent notifications with timestamps
Empty state when no notifications
Tests for badge rendering, mark-as-read, empty state
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Fixed PATCH route schema mismatch (read→state). 9 tests.

userStories.title: PDF generation service with @react-pdf/renderer
userStories.description: Install @react-pdf/renderer and create a PDF generation service. Build reusable PDF document templates for estimates and project status reports. API route to generate and return PDF buffer.
acceptanceCriteria: @react-pdf/renderer installed
PDF generator service with generatePdf(template, data) function
EstimatePDF template renders: header with company name, client info, line items table, subtotal/markup/tax/total, terms
ProjectStatusPDF template renders: project header, milestone progress, task summary, recent daily logs
API route POST /api/pdf/generate accepts type + data, returns PDF buffer
Rate limited
Tests for generator, template rendering, API route
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: 9 tests. renderToBuffer returns Uint8Array. Use React.createElement for server-side.

userStories.title: Estimate PDF export button on estimate detail page
userStories.description: Add an Export PDF button to the estimate detail page that calls the PDF generation API and downloads the result. Show loading state during generation.
acceptanceCriteria: ExportPdfButton component exists with loading/error states
Button calls /api/pdf/generate with estimate data
Downloaded file named Estimate-{number}-{date}.pdf
Loading spinner during generation
Error toast on failure
Tests for button states and download trigger
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass

userStories.title: E2E CHECKPOINT: Realtime + PDF features verified
userStories.description: Integration tests verifying Realtime subscription lifecycle and PDF generation pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Realtime hook test: subscribe, receive event, invalidate cache, unsubscribe
Notification bell test: render, receive notification, badge updates, mark read
PDF generation test: POST /api/pdf/generate with estimate data returns buffer
PDF generation test: POST /api/pdf/generate with project status data returns buffer
PDF generation test: invalid type returns 400
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT - Gate before proceeding to dashboards

userStories.title: Executive dashboard with KPI cards and charts
userStories.description: Build an executive dashboard page showing key business metrics: revenue pipeline, active projects, win rate, avg deal size. Use aggregation API routes for data.
acceptanceCriteria: Executive dashboard page at /org/[orgSlug]/dashboard/executive
KPICard component: value, label, trend (up/down/flat), change percentage
KPI cards: Total Pipeline Value, Active Projects, Win Rate, Avg Deal Size
Pipeline chart showing opportunity stages with values
API route aggregates data from opportunities, projects, estimates tables
Role-gated: only executive + platform_admin can access
Loading skeletons while data fetches
Tests for KPICard, PipelineChart, API route, role gating
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass

userStories.title: Project manager dashboard with active project health cards
userStories.description: Build a PM dashboard showing their active projects with health indicators, upcoming milestones, overdue tasks, and recent daily logs.
acceptanceCriteria: PM dashboard page at /org/[orgSlug]/dashboard/pm
ProjectHealthCard: project name, health score (green/yellow/red), milestone progress bar, overdue task count
Health score calculated from: milestone completion %, overdue tasks, days since last daily log
API route filters to projects where current user is project_manager
Shows upcoming milestones (next 7 days) across all projects
Shows overdue tasks across all projects
Role-gated: project_manager + operations_manager + executive
Tests for health calculation, card rendering, API filtering
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass

userStories.title: Global search expansion — all entities in CommandPalette
userStories.description: Expand CommandPalette to search across ALL entity types: leads, accounts, contacts, opportunities, estimates, projects, tasks. Add entity type icons and keyboard navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: CommandPalette searches: leads, accounts, contacts, opportunities, estimates, projects, tasks
Results grouped by entity type with icons
API route /api/search/global does parallel queries across tables
Search is case-insensitive, matches name/title/email fields
Max 5 results per entity type
Keyboard navigation: arrow keys + enter to select
Clicking result navigates to entity detail page
Debounced input (300ms)
Tests for search API, result grouping, navigation
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Keep it simple — text search with ILIKE, not full-text search.

userStories.title: Audit log viewer page with filtering
userStories.description: Build an audit log viewer that shows all system activity. Filterable by entity type, user, date range, and action type.
acceptanceCriteria: Audit log page at /org/[orgSlug]/admin/audit-log
API route queries audit_log table with pagination
Filters: entity_type, user_id, action (create/update/delete), date range
Table columns: timestamp, user, action, entity type, entity name, details
Expandable row to show full change diff
Role-gated: platform_admin + executive only
Pagination with page size selector
Tests for API filtering, pagination, role gating
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: If audit_log table doesn't exist, create the API route assuming it will. Mock in tests.

userStories.title: E2E CHECKPOINT: Dashboards + Search + Audit verified
userStories.description: Integration tests for executive dashboard, PM dashboard, global search, and audit log.
acceptanceCriteria: Executive dashboard API returns aggregated KPIs
PM dashboard API filters by current user projects
Global search returns results across all entity types
Global search respects division isolation
Audit log API supports all filter combinations
Audit log pagination works correctly
Role gating enforced on all dashboard routes
All tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT - Gate before proceeding to UX features

userStories.title: Bulk operations API for CRM entities
userStories.description: Add bulk operation endpoints for leads and contacts: bulk update (assign, change stage), bulk delete, bulk export CSV.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/crm/leads/bulk with action: assign|stage|delete|export
POST /api/crm/contacts/bulk with action: assign|delete|export
Bulk assign: updates assigned_to for array of IDs
Bulk stage: updates stage for array of lead IDs
Bulk delete: soft-deletes array of IDs
Bulk export: returns CSV with selected columns
Max 100 items per bulk operation
Rate limited (30 req/min)
Tests for each action type, validation, limits
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass

userStories.title: Keyboard shortcuts expansion and help overlay
userStories.description: Expand keyboard shortcuts beyond Cmd+K. Add: Cmd+/ for help overlay, G+L for leads, G+P for projects, G+E for estimates, G+D for dashboard.
acceptanceCriteria: Cmd+/ or Ctrl+/ opens shortcuts help overlay
Help overlay lists all available shortcuts grouped by category
Navigation shortcuts: G then L (leads), G then P (projects), G then E (estimates), G then D (dashboard)
Shortcuts disabled when focus is in input/textarea
Tests for shortcut registration, chord detection, overlay toggle
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass

userStories.title: Toast feedback system with sonner
userStories.description: Create a toast notification system for user actions (save, delete, bulk ops). Support undo action on destructive operations.
acceptanceCriteria: sonner installed and toast provider wraps app layout
toast.success(), toast.error(), toast.info() functions exported from lib/toast.ts
Undo toast shows Undo button with 5-second countdown
Undo callback fires when clicked before timeout
Toasts auto-dismiss after 5 seconds
Multiple toasts stack without overlapping
Tests for toast rendering, undo flow, auto-dismiss
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass

userStories.title: Onboarding wizard for new organizations
userStories.description: Create a step-by-step onboarding wizard that guides new organizations through: company profile setup, division configuration, first user invites.
acceptanceCriteria: OnboardingWizard component with step indicator
Step 1: Company profile (name, address, phone)
Step 2: Division setup (add divisions from predefined list)
Step 3: Invite team members (email + role selector)
Step 4: Success screen with quick links to CRM, Estimates, Projects
API route GET /api/onboarding/status returns completed boolean and step number
Wizard only shows when onboarding not completed
Skip button on each step
Tests for each step, navigation, skip, completion
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Wire the UI and form validation — don't actually perform invites.

userStories.title: E2E CHECKPOINT: UX features verified
userStories.description: Integration tests for bulk operations, keyboard shortcuts, toast system, and onboarding wizard.
acceptanceCriteria: Bulk assign updates all specified leads
Bulk delete soft-deletes all specified contacts
Bulk export returns valid CSV
Bulk operation rejects >100 items
Keyboard shortcut chord detection works
Toast undo callback fires correctly
Onboarding status API returns correct state
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: React Query optimization and query key factory
userStories.description: Create query key factory for consistent cache management. Update data-fetching hooks with proper staleTime, cacheTime settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Query key factory in lib/query-keys.ts with typed keys for all entities
All data hooks use query key factory (no inline string keys)
staleTime set: 30s for lists, 60s for detail views, 5min for reference data
Tests verify query key consistency and staleTime config
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Don't rewrite hooks — add query key factory and update existing hooks.

userStories.title: Error boundary console.log cleanup and Sentry integration
userStories.description: Migrate all console.error calls in error boundaries to Sentry.captureException + structured logger.
acceptanceCriteria: All 11 error.tsx files use Sentry.captureException instead of console.error
Import Sentry from @sentry/nextjs in each error boundary
No console.log/warn/error calls remain in app/ or lib/ except logger.ts
Tests verify Sentry.captureException is called on error
Typecheck passes
All existing tests still pass
userStories.notes: Simple find-and-replace. Don't change error boundary UI.

userStories.title: Final quality gate: full suite verification
userStories.description: Run complete quality gate. Verify lint (0 errors), typecheck clean, all tests pass, build succeeds.
acceptanceCriteria: Lint: 0 errors
Typecheck: 0 errors
All tests pass (count recorded in progress.txt)
Build succeeds
No regressions from baseline (3092 tests)
userStories.notes: Final verification story. Fix any failures before marking passes: true.
